props.name: ariaDescription
props.description:
Adds an aria-description for slider labels.

Use when sliders have formatted reference values.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description:
Adds an `aria-label` to the native control.

Use this if you don't have a visible label for this control.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether or not the slider is disabled.

props.name: hideFillLine
props.description: Hides the colored fill line, so only the handle is visible.

props.name: i18nStrings
props.description: An object containing all the necessary localized strings required by the component.

props.name: readOnly
props.description:
Specifies if the control is read-only, which prevents the
user from modifying the value, but does not prevent the value from
being included in a form submission. A read-only control is still focusable.

props.name: referenceValues
props.description: Labels shown between the minimum and maximum values.

props.name: step
props.description: How big the step size is.

props.name: tickMarks
props.description: Show the tick marks along the slider line. Use with stepped sliders, except in extreme cases.

props.name: valueFormatter
props.description: Formats the values. This will format both the labels and the tooltip.

events.name: change
events.description:
Called when the user selects a value.
The event `detail` contains the current `value`.
